title: FormField
description: Accessible wrapper that provides label, helper text, error state and id/aria linking for any form control.

playground.label: Email
playground.helperText: We will use this to confirm your account.

input.title: With Input
input.desc: Wrapping a text field with label and helper text.

select.title: With Select
select.desc: FormField also works with any composed control.

textarea.title: With Textarea
textarea.desc: Use the hint prop to add auxiliary text to the right of the label.

error.title: With error
error.desc: errorText replaces the helperText and propagates the invalid state to the control.

horizontal.title: Horizontal layout
horizontal.desc: orientation='horizontal' places the label on the left with a fixed width.

props.label: Visible label text. Linked to the control via for/id.
props.helperText: Helper text below the control. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message. Activates aria-invalid and danger color on the control.
props.required: Shows the red asterisk and propagates required to the slot.
props.disabled: Applies the disabled state and propagates it to the child control.
props.id: id linked to the label. Auto-generated if omitted.
props.orientation: Layout of the label relative to the control.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the outer wrapper.
props.hint: Auxiliary text to the right of the label (e.g. "Optional").
props.as: HTML tag of the root wrapper.

slots.default: Form control. Receives \{ id, describedBy, invalid, disabled, required, color \} as slot props.
slots.label: Replaces the label content when custom HTML is needed.
slots.helper: Replaces the helperText with rich content.

types.title: FormField & FormFieldSlotProps
types.desc: FormField defines the wrapper props. FormFieldSlotProps are the bindings exposed by the default slot to wire aria/ids automatically onto the inner control.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaGroup: The wrapper is exposed as a group for screen readers
a11y.ariaLabelledBy: The label id is linked to the control so screen readers announce the label
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Helper or error text id is linked to the control for additional context
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present, marking the field as invalid
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.focusLabel: Clicking the label moves focus to the associated form control
a11y.focusError: Error messages are programmatically linked to the control via aria-describedby
